backend.changelog: Generate now remembers, per cached CAD file, which platform version it last downloaded - so repeat runs skip re-downloading drawings and parts that are already current (drawing phase drops from hours to minutes on large assemblies from the second run), and outdated locally-cached assemblies are refreshed automatically even on a first run, eliminating the blocking 'Unable to load revision A.1 - will use B.1' SolidWorks dialogs caused by stale local copies.

cadBridge.changelog: Per-file freshness index: the agent records which platform version each cached CAD file was downloaded at, so repeat Generate runs reuse current files instead of re-downloading them, and genuinely outdated cached assemblies are refreshed automatically (removes the blocking revision-conflict dialogs). Interrupted runs keep their progress. Also includes 1.8.73: drawing PDFs now contain ALL non-DXF sheets (clear the generated-files cache or use Force Regenerate once so existing incomplete PDFs are rewritten).
